name: Google Meet Integration
description: Integrate Google Meet with LMS courses

GOOGLE_PROJECT_ID.label: Google Project ID
GOOGLE_PROJECT_ID.placeholder: Enter your Google Cloud Project ID

GOOGLE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_JSON.label: Service Account JSON (Optional for Service Accounts)
GOOGLE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_JSON.placeholder: Paste the contents of your Service Account JSON key if using Service Account auth

GOOGLE_ADMIN_EMAIL.label: Google Workspace Admin Email
GOOGLE_ADMIN_EMAIL.placeholder: Email of the user to impersonate (required for Meet creation)
